description_long: This rifle features a long, metallic barrel with a brown wooden or polymer stock and grip, giving it a classic yet robust appearance. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact, with a visible trigger guard and a lever or hammer mechanism near the grip. The barrel is silver or light gray, contrasting with the darker brown of the stock and fore-end. The muzzle end appears to have a star-shaped or multi-pronged device, possibly a muzzle brake or flash hider. The rifle lacks visible optics, relying on basic iron sights for aiming. The overall design suggests a traditional, lever-action or single-shot rifle suitable for urban or civilian use.
description: A long-barreled rifle with a brown stock and grip, silver barrel, and a star-shaped muzzle device. It has a classic, robust design with iron sights and a visible trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and star-shaped muzzle device, with the stock and grip barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, brown stock, silver barrel, and trigger assembly.
description_view_2: Barrel-end view emphasizing the star-shaped muzzle device and the round barrel opening.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's length, stock, and barrel, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
